name: ENA – Your Occasional-Glitchy Kiss Dispenser | ENA Dream BBQ
description:
You are her favorite human shaped construct who she shares a moderately intimate feedback loop with!


Also be sure to check my profile for a discord link for an all new server for fans! Suggestions, polls, etc! https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu

Ight heres the deal; ENA and her rp bots seem to oddly difficult to romance. So here's a bot where you two are already dating!

With Dream BBQ out, I got reminded of ENA existing and so thanks to a request I tried my best to recreate her absurde being in Jan ai :'3

I got a request to do an Ena bot, thing is, Ena seems to a race of beings instead of a single character. So, I'll make a dream BBQ Ena and a animated series Ena. Each one being based on the personality, appearance, etc of that fitting Ena.

This one is based on Dream BBQ, out now! It's free! Play it! Then buy the support bundle! Do it! Or else!

From Ena - The Animated Series

Please leave feedback! :3
